name: llvm-runtime-raw-pcode-smoke
notes: Architecture-scoped raw p-code smoke rows for LLVM baremetal objects. Rows may be runtime-ready, typed unsupported, or compile-only depending on current Fission runtime coverage.

rows.name: llvm-x86-64-baremetal
rows.notes: LLVM baremetal object smoke for x86-64. Expected to run through current runtime lane.

rows.name: llvm-x86-baremetal
rows.notes: LLVM baremetal object smoke for x86. Currently resolves to compile-only runtime selection and should stay fail-closed until runtime coverage exists.
